column1: # Each row is a single rm flag token. Authored from `man rm` (GNU + BSD).
# nomatch = token does not request recursion
# Recursive forms (GNU rm: -r, -R, --recursive). Short bundles carry the
# recursive letter alongside other letters in any order.
# --recursive=<x> expresses recursive intent, so the policy denies it (golden:
# `rm --recursive=true ~`) even though GNU rm rejects the =arg syntax.
